title: erodium cicutarium var. arenarium
intro: Erodium cicutarium var. arenarium, also known as red-stemmed stork's bill, is a perennial herb belonging to the geranium family, with a distribution primarily in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium var. arenarium include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried as a herbal supplement, although its preparation and consumption should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
